name: Best Ever Low-Fat Baked Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow bowl, mix together the bread crumbs, parmesan cheese, and seasoning.
2. Dip each chicken breast in the liquid margarine, then coat with the bread crumb mixture.
3. Place each coated chicken breast on a baking sheet sprayed with non-stick cooking spray.
4. Bake for approximately 30-45 minutes at 375°F until golden brown. (Yields 4 servings)
5. Serve and enjoy your healthy meal!
